      1919
      "# 🏦 Project Overview\n",
      2020
      "\n",
      21-
      "Welcome to your **Smart Finance Assistant** development journey! This notebook will evolve from basic CSV processing to a complete AI-powered finance application.\n",
      21+
      "Welcome to the development of **Budget Buddy**, an AI-powered Smart Finance Assistant designed to help students and young workers better understand their spending habits and improve budgeting awareness.\n",
      22+
      "\n",
      23+
      "This project analyses CSV transaction data and transforms raw financial records into meaningful spending insights, budgeting recommendations, savings guidance, and interactive financial support.\n",
      24+
      "\n",
      2225
      "\n",
      2326
      "**Final Application Components:**\n",
      2427
      "- 💬 **AI Chat Interface** - Financial advice personality\n",
      2528
      "- 📊 **Data Analysis** - CSV transaction processing \n",
      2629
      "- 🔍 **RAG System** - Retrieval from financial documents\n",
      2730
      "- 🛠️ **Custom Tools** - Calculators and utilities\n",
      2831
      "- 🌐 **Gradio UI** - Professional web interface\n",
      2932
      "\n",
      30-
      "**Development Approach**: Build progressively from foundation to advanced features, using AI collaboration throughout."
      33+
      "**Development Approach**: The Budget Buddy project was developed progressively from basic CSV data processing into a complete AI-powered finance assistant application with chatbot, savings tools, RAG guidance, and interactive visualisations.\n",
      34+
      "\n",
      35+
      "**Project Goal:**\n",
      36+
      "\n",
      37+
      "The purpose of Budget Buddy is to help users:\n",
      38+
      "- understand spending patterns\n",
      39+
      "- identify unnecessary expenses\n",
      40+
      "- improve savings awareness\n",
      41+
      "- receive practical budgeting recommendations\n",
      42+
      "- interact with financial insights using a simple web application\n",
      43+
      "\n",
      44+
      "This project combines business programming, financial data analysis, AI collaboration, and user-focused application design into a complete finance assistant solution."
      3145
      ]

      "\u001b[2K \u001b[90m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m \u001b[32m143.7/143.7 kB\u001b[0m \u001b[31m5.2 MB/s\u001b[0m eta \u001b[36m0:00:00\u001b[0m\n",

      178192

      179193
      "\u001b[2K \u001b[90m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m \u001b[32m360.7/360.7 kB\u001b[0m \u001b[31m25.0 MB/s\u001b[0m eta \u001b[36m0:00:00\u001b[0m\n",
      180194
      "\u001b[?25hInstalling collected packages: python-docx, pymupdf, jiter, instructor, hands-on-ai\n",
      181195

      198212
      "## Hands-on-AI Configuration\n",
      199213

      200214
      "Set up the hands-on-ai package for advanced features (chat, RAG, tools):"
      201215
      ]

      },
      203217
      {

      207221
      "colab": {

      "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"

      "source": [
      213227
      "import os\n",
      214228
      "from getpass import getpass\n",
      215229
      "\n",
      216230
      "# Configure hands-on-ai server connection\n",
      217231
      "os.environ['HANDS_ON_AI_SERVER'] = 'https://ollama.locollm.org'\n",
      218232
      "os.environ['HANDS_ON_AI_MODEL'] = 'gemma3:4b'\n",
      219233
      "os.environ['HANDS_ON_AI_API_KEY'] = 'Curtin2026ISYS20015002'\n",
      220234
      "\n",
      221235
      "print(\"🔑 Hands-on-AI configured successfully!\")"
      222236
      ],
      223-
      "execution_count": 12,
      237+
      "execution_count": null,

      "text": [
      229243
      "🔑 Hands-on-AI configured successfully!\n"
      230244
      ]
      231245
      }

      ]

      },

      "source": [
      249263
      "## Connection Test\n",
      250264
      "\n",
      251265
      "Test that everything is working correctly:"
      252266
      ]
      253267
      },
      254268
      {
      255269
      "cell_type": "code",
      256270
      "metadata": {
      257271
      "id": "D8etbQHl6Wr-",
      258272
      "colab": {
      259273
      "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
      260274
      },
      261275
      "outputId": "fad21f8c-bf28-465f-d5f4-c5a617c1f1dc"
      262276
      },
      263277
      "source": [
      264278
      "from hands_on_ai.chat import get_response\n",
      265279
      "\n",
      266280
      "# Test the connection to the hands-on-ai server\n",
      267281
      "try:\n",
      268282
      " response = get_response(\"Hello! I'm building a Smart Finance Assistant.\")\n",
      269283
      " if \"Error:\" not in response:\n",
      270284
      " print(\"✅ Hands-on-AI connection successful!\")\n",
      271285
      " print(f\"Response: {response}\")\n",
      272286
      " else:\n",
      273287
      " print(f\"❌ Connection issue: {response}\")\n",
      274288
      " print(\"You can still work on the data processing foundation without this.\")\n",
      275289
      "except Exception as e:\n",
      276290
      " print(f\"❌ Connection issue: {e}\")\n",
      277291
      " print(\"You can still work on the data processing foundation without this.\")"
      278292
      ],
      279293
      "execution_count": null,
      280294
      "outputs": [
      281295
      {
      282296
      "output_type": "stream",
      283297
      "name": "stdout",
      284298
      "text": [
      285299
      "⏳ Summoning the knowledge spirits... 'gemma3:4b' booting...\n",
      286300
      "✅ Hands-on-AI connection successful!\n",
      287301
      "Response: That's fantastic! Building a Smart Finance Assistant sounds like a really exciting and useful project. I'd love to hear more about it. \n",
      288302
      "\n",
      289303
      "To help me understand how I can best assist you, could you tell me a bit about it? For example:\n",
      290304
      "\n",
      291305
      "* **What's the primary goal of your assistant?** What will it *do* for the user? (e.g., track spending, budget, provide investment advice, generate reports, etc.)\n",
      292306
      "* **What kind of user experience are you aiming for?** (e.g., voice-controlled, chatbot-based, web app, mobile app?)\n",
      293307
      "* **What technologies are you considering using?** (e.g., Python, Node.js, specific AI/ML libraries like TensorFlow or PyTorch, database systems?)\n",
      294308
      "* **What’s the current stage of development?** Are you just starting to brainstorm, or have you already built some basic functionality?\n",
      295309
      "\n",
      296310
      "Don’t worry if you don’t have all the answers yet - just share what you've got! I can help you with research, brainstorming ideas, suggesting potential technologies, offering code examples, and generally just being a helpful resource as you build.\n",
      297311
      "\n",
      298312
      "Let's start by hearing a little bit about your vision. What's the one thing you're most excited about with this project?\n"
      299313
      ]
      300314
      }
      301315
      ]
      302316
      },
      303317
      {
      304318
      "cell_type": "raw",
      305319
      "metadata": {
      306320
      "id": "tjjxTr-k6WsD"
      307321
      },
      308322
      "source": [
      309323
      "---"
      310324
      ]
      311325
      },
      312326
      {
      313327
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      314328
      "metadata": {
      315329
      "id": "5ygz5Y8b6WsG"
      316330
      },
      317331
      "source": [
      318332
      "# 🏗️ Foundation: Data Processing Skills\n",
      319333
      "\n",
      320334
      "Before building advanced features, establish solid data processing foundations. This section focuses on CSV transaction analysis - the core of your finance assistant.\n",
      321335
      "\n",
      322336
      "## Foundation Skill Checkpoint ✅\n",
      323337
      "\n",
      324338
      "**Master these basics before advancing to chat/RAG/tools:**\n",
      325339
      "- [ ] Load and clean CSV transaction data\n",
      326340
      "- [ ] Handle real-world data issues (dollar signs, missing values)\n",
      327341
      "- [ ] Calculate spending summaries by category \n",
      328342
      "- [ ] Generate business-appropriate insights\n",
      329343
      "- [ ] Format output for professional presentation\n",
      330344
      "- [ ] Test functions with various data scenarios\n",
      331345
      "\n",
      332346
      "::: {.callout-tip}\n",
      333347
      "## 🤖 AI Collaboration Strategy\n",
      334348
      "\n",
      335349
      "For this foundation work, use AI to:\n",
      336350
      "1. **Generate initial code** with specific business context\n",
      337351
      "2. **Handle data cleaning** and validation\n",
      338352
      "3. **Create professional formatting** for outputs\n",
      339353
      "4. **Suggest business insights** from data patterns\n",
      340354
      "5. **Help with testing** edge cases and error handling\n",
      341355
      "\n",
      342356
      "**Remember**: You're directing AI like a junior developer - always review and improve their suggestions!\n",
      343357
      ":::\n",
      344358
      "\n",
      345359
      "## Sample Transaction Data Setup\n",
      346360
      "\n",
      347361
      "Create or load sample transaction data to work with:"
      348362
      ]
      349363
      },
      350364
      {
      351365
      "cell_type": "code",
      352366
      "metadata": {
      353367
      "id": "8QK1sI2Q6WsH",
      354368
      "colab": {
      355369
      "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
      356370
      },
      357371
      "outputId": "67883985-a21c-40e3-8ff4-a027bdb98dbc"
      358372
      },
      359373
      "source": [
      360374
      "# 🤖 AI Collaboration Opportunity:\n",
      361375
      "# Ask AI to help you create realistic sample transaction data\n",
      362376
      "# Include Australian businesses and various spending categories\n",
      363377
      "\n",
      364378
      "# Sample data structure for testing\n",
      365379
      "sample_transactions = {\n",
      366380
      " 'Date': ['2024-08-01', '2024-08-02', '2024-08-03', '2024-08-04', '2024-08-05'],\n",
      367381
      " 'Amount': ['$45.50', '$12.00', '$89.95', '$3.50', '-$25.00'], # Note: includes $ signs and refund\n",
      368382
      " 'Category': ['Groceries', 'Transport', 'Entertainment', 'Coffee', 'Refund'],\n",
      369383
      " 'Description': ['Woolworths', 'Opal Card', 'Concert Tickets', 'Campus Cafe', 'Returned Item']\n",
      370384
      "}\n",
      371385
      "\n",
      372386
      "# Create DataFrame from sample data\n",
      373387
      "df_sample = pd.DataFrame(sample_transactions)\n",
      374388
      "print(\"📋 Sample transaction data created:\")\n",
      375389
      "print(df_sample)"
      376390
      ],
      377391
      "execution_count": null,
      378392
      "outputs": [
      379393
      {
      380394
      "output_type": "stream",
      381395
      "name": "stdout",
      382396
      "text": [
      383397
      "📋 Sample transaction data created:\n",
      384398
      " Date Amount Category Description\n",
      385399
      "0 2024-08-01 $45.50 Groceries Woolworths\n",
      386400
      "1 2024-08-02 $12.00 Transport Opal Card\n",
      387401
      "2 2024-08-03 $89.95 Entertainment Concert Tickets\n",
      388402
      "3 2024-08-04 $3.50 Coffee Campus Cafe\n",
      389403
      "4 2024-08-05 -$25.00 Refund Returned Item\n"
      390404
      ]
      391405
      }
      392406
      ]
      393407
      },
      394408
      {
      395409
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      396410
      "metadata": {
      397411
      "id": "V4YRGq-Y6WsH"
      398412
      },
      399413
      "source": [
      400414
      "---\n",
      401415
      "\n",
      402416
      "# 📊 Six-Step Development Methodology\n",
      403417
      "\n",
      404418
      "Your notebook must demonstrate the six-step methodology with clear evidence of AI collaboration at each step.\n",
      405419
      "\n",
      406420
      "## STEP 1: Understand the Problem\n",
      407421
      "\n",
      408422
      "**🎯 Define Your Finance Problem**\n",
      409423
      "\n",
      410424
      "In this section, clearly state your chosen finance problem in business terms.\n",
      411425
      "\n",
      412426
      "::: {.callout-note}\n",
      413427
      "## Problem Definition Template\n",
      414428
      "\n",
      415429
      "*Example: \"I want to help people understand their spending habits by analyzing their bank transaction exports. The system should identify spending patterns, highlight potential savings opportunities, and provide actionable financial insights in easy-to-understand language.\"*\n",
      416430
      "\n",
      417431
      "**🤖 AI Prompt to Try:**\n",
      418432
      "```\n",
      419433
      "\"I am developing a Smart Finance Assistant called Budget Buddy for students and young workers. The application will analyse CSV transaction data and provide financial insights, budgeting recommendations, and spending awareness.\n",
      420434
      "\n",
      421435
      "Help me brainstorm realistic personal finance problems that could be solved using transaction data analysis. Focus on common financial challenges such as overspending, poor budgeting habits, unnecessary subscriptions, excessive food delivery spending, shopping habits, transport costs, and lack of savings awareness.\n",
      422436
      "\n",
      423437
      "Also suggest how a CSV analysis tool could help users better understand their spending patterns, identify high-expense categories, and make practical financial decisions in simple language suitable for non-technical users.\"\n",
      424438
      "```\n",
      425439
      "\n",
      426440
      "**Your Problem Statement:**\n",
      427441
      "Many students and young workers struggle to manage their spending because daily expenses such as food delivery, shopping, subscriptions, transport, coffee, and entertainment can quickly add up without proper tracking. Although banking applications allow users to export transaction history as CSV files, the raw transaction data is often difficult to understand and analyse manually.\n",
      428442
      "\n",
      429443
      "The purpose of this Smart Finance Assistant, called Budget Buddy, is to help users better understand their financial habits by analysing CSV transaction data automatically. The application identifies spending patterns, calculates total expenses, groups spending into categories, highlights the highest spending areas, and provides practical budgeting recommendations in simple language.\n",
      430444
      "\n",
      431445
      "This project is designed to improve spending awareness and help users make better financial decisions. By transforming raw financial data into meaningful insights, charts, and AI-generated recommendations, the application provides users with a simple and user-friendly budgeting assistant.\n",
      432446
      "\n",
      433447
      "## STEP 2: Identify Inputs and Outputs\n",
      434448
      "\n",
      435449
      "**📥 Define Your Data Flow**\n",
      436450
      "\n",
      437451
      "The Budget Buddy Smart Finance Assistant uses CSV transaction data to help students and young workers better understand their financial habits and improve budgeting awareness.\n",
      438452
      "\n",
      439453
      "**🤖 AI Prompt to Try:**\n",
      440454
      "```\n",
      441455
      "\"I am developing a Smart Finance Assistant called Budget Buddy that analyses CSV transaction data for students and young workers. The application will process transaction records, identify spending patterns, generate budgeting recommendations, and help users improve financial awareness.\n",
      442456
      "\n",
      443457
      "Help me identify the most useful inputs and outputs for this type of finance application. Consider both technical data processing requirements and business value for users.\n",
      444458
      "\n",
      445459
      "The suggestions should include:\n",
      446460
      "- important transaction data fields\n",
      447461
      "- spending categories\n",
      448462
      "- savings goal information\n",
      449463
      "- financial summaries\n",
      450464
      "- spending trend analysis\n",
      451465
      "- budgeting recommendations\n",
      452466
      "- visual outputs such as charts\n",
      453467
      "- chatbot interactions\n",
      454468
      "- features that would help non-technical users better understand their spending habits and improve budgeting decisions.\"\n",
      455469
      "```\n",
      456470
      "\n",
      457471
      "**Your Input/Output Definition:**\n",
      458472
      "\n",
      459473
      "**Inputs:**\n",
      460474
      "\n",
      461475
      "The application works with several important inputs that are required for financial analysis and recommendation generation.\n",
      462476
      "\n",
      463477
      "The main input is a CSV transaction file uploaded by the user. This file contains transaction records exported from a banking application or finance platform.\n",
      464478
      "\n",
      465479
      "The CSV file includes the following columns:\n",
      466480
      "- Date\n",
      467481
      "- Amount\n",
      468482
      "- Category\n",
      469483
      "- Description\n",
      470484
      "\n",
      471485
      "Additional inputs used by the application include:\n",
      472486
      "- user savings goals\n",
      473487
      "- preferred spending categories to analyse\n",
      474488
      "- monthly savings contribution amount\n",
      475489
      "- target savings amount\n",
      476490
      "- finance-related questions asked to the chatbot\n",
      477491
      "- uploaded transaction history for a selected time period\n",
      478492
      "\n",
      479493
      "The application processes these inputs to clean and analyse financial transaction data.\n",
      480494
      "\n",
      481495
      "**Outputs:**\n",
      482496
      "\n",
      483497
      "The application generates several outputs that help users understand their spending behaviour and make better financial decisions.\n",
      484498
      "\n",
      485499
      "The outputs include:\n",
      486500
      "- cleaned and validated transaction data\n",
      487501
      "- total spending summary\n",
      488502
      "- spending totals grouped by category\n",
      489503
      "- average transaction amount\n",
      490504
      "- highest spending category\n",
      491505
      "- refund analysis\n",
      492506
      "- spending percentage breakdowns\n",
      493507
      "- spending trend insights\n",
      494508
      "- financial recommendations and budgeting advice\n",
      495509
      "- savings goal calculation results\n",
      496510
      "- AI chatbot financial responses\n",
      497511
      "- visual charts such as bar graphs and pie charts\n",
      498512
      "\n",
      499513
      "These outputs help users identify unnecessary expenses, improve spending awareness, and develop better budgeting habits using easy-to-understand financial insights.\n",
      500514
      "\n",
      501515
      "## STEP 3: Work the Problem by Hand\n",
      502516
      "\n",
      503517
      "**✋ Manual Calculation Examples**\n",
      504518
      "\n",
      505519
      "Show 2-3 worked examples to understand the logic before coding.\n",
      506520
      "\n",
      507521
      "\n",
      508522
      "## Example Business Calculation\n",
      509523
      "\n",
      510524
      "Given this sample data:\n",
      511525
      "\n",
      512526
      "| Date | Amount | Category | Description |\n",
      513527
      "|------|--------|----------|-------------|\n",
      514528
      "| 2024-08-01 | $45.50 | Groceries | Woolworths |\n",
      515529
      "| 2024-08-02 | $12.00 | Transport | Opal Card |\n",
      516530
      "| 2024-08-03 | $89.95 | Entertainment | Concert |\n",
      517531
      "| 2024-08-04 | -$15.00 | Refund | Returned item |\n",
      518532
      "\n",
      519533
      "**Manual Calculations:**\n",
      520534
      "- Total Spending: $45.50 + $12.00 + $89.95 - $15.00 = $132.45\n",
      521535
      "- By Category: Groceries $45.50, Transport $12.00, Entertainment $89.95\n",
      522536
      "- Average Transaction: $132.45 ÷ 4 = $33.11\n",
      523537
      "- Insight: Entertainment represents 67% of positive spending\n",
      524538
      "\n",
      525539
      "**🤖 AI Prompt to Try:**\n",
      526540
      "```\n",
      527541
      "\"Give me 3 realistic examples of Australian transaction data with different\n",
      528542
      "scenarios (normal spending, refunds, large purchases). Show me how to manually\n",
      529543
      "calculate meaningful financial insights from each scenario.\"\n",
      530544
      "```\n",
      531545
      "\n",
      532546
      "**Your Manual Examples:**\n",
      533547
      "### Example 1: Normal Spending with Refund\n",
      534548
      "\n",
      535549
      "| Date | Amount | Category | Description |\n",
      536550
      "|---|---:|---|---|\n",
      537551
      "| 2024-09-01 | $72.40 | Food Delivery | Uber Eats |\n",
      538552
      "| 2024-09-02 | $18.50 | Fuel | BP Service Station |\n",
      539553
      "| 2024-09-03 | $120.00 | Shopping | Kmart |\n",
      540554
      "| 2024-09-04 | $6.80 | Coffee | Starbucks |\n",
      541555
      "| 2024-09-05 | -$20.00 | Refund | Returned Headphones |\n",
      542556
      "\n",
      543557
      "Manual Calculations:\n",
      544558
      "\n",
      545559
      "- Total Spending: $72.40 + $18.50 + $120.00 + $6.80 - $20.00 = $197.70\n",
      546560
      "- Positive Spending Only: $72.40 + $18.50 + $120.00 + $6.80 = $217.70\n",
      547561
      "- Refund Total: -$20.00\n",
      548562
      "- Highest Spending Category: Shopping = $120.00\n",
      549563
      "- Average Transaction: $197.70 ÷ 5 = $39.54\n",
      550564
      "\n",
      551565
      "Insight: Shopping is the highest spending category. This suggests the user may need to review non-essential purchases and set a weekly shopping limit.\n",
      552566
      "\n",
      553567
      "### Example 2: Subscription and Entertainment Spending\n",
      554568
      "\n",
      555569
      "| Date | Amount | Category | Description |\n",
      556570
      "|---|---:|---|---|\n",
      557571
      "| 2024-09-06 | $14.99 | Subscription | Netflix |\n",
      558572
      "| 2024-09-07 | $65.00 | Entertainment | Event Cinema |\n",
      559573
      "| 2024-09-08 | $28.75 | Dining Out | Local Restaurant |\n",
      560574
      "\n",
      561575
      "Manual Calculations:\n",
      562576
      "\n",
      563577
      "- Total Spending: $14.99 + $65.00 + $28.75 = $108.74\n",
      564578
      "- Highest Spending Category: Entertainment = $65.00\n",
      565579
      "- Average Transaction: $108.74 ÷ 3 = $36.25\n",
      566580
      "\n",
      567581
      "Insight: Entertainment is the largest expense in this example. The user could reduce spending by limiting paid entertainment activities or choosing lower-cost alternatives.\n",
      568582
      "\n",
      569583
      "### Example 3: Essential Daily Expenses\n",
      570584
      "\n",
      571585
      "| Date | Amount | Category | Description |\n",
      572586
      "|---|---:|---|---|\n",
      573587
      "| 2024-09-09 | $42.30 | Groceries | Coles |\n",
      574588
      "| 2024-09-10 | $9.50 | Transport | Transperth |\n",
      575589
      "| 2024-09-11 | $7.20 | Coffee | Campus Cafe |\n",
      576590
      "\n",
      577591
      "Manual Calculations:\n",
      578592
      "\n",
      579593
      "- Total Spending: $42.30 + $9.50 + $7.20 = $59.00\n",
      580594
      "- Highest Spending Category: Groceries = $42.30\n",
      581595
      "- Average Transaction: $59.00 ÷ 3 = $19.67\n",
      582596
      "\n",
      583597
      "Insight: Most of the spending is on groceries, which is an essential category. However, small purchases like coffee should still be tracked because they can add up over time.\n",
      584598
      "\n",
      585599
      "\n",
      586600
      "**🤖 AI Prompt to Try:**\n",
      587601
      "```\n",
      588602
      "\"I am developing a Smart Finance Assistant called Budget Buddy. Give me three realistic Australian-style transaction examples using categories such as Food Delivery, Fuel, Shopping, Coffee, Subscriptions, Groceries, Transport, Dining Out, Entertainment, and Refunds.\n",
      589603
      "\n",
      590604
      "For each example, show manual calculations for total spending, positive spending, refunds, highest spending category, average transaction amount, and a simple financial insight. The explanation should help me understand the business logic before writing Python code.\"\n",
      591605
      "```\n",
      592606
      "## STEP 4: Write Pseudocode\n",
      593607
      "\n",
      594608
      "**📝 Plan Your Solution Logic**\n",
      595609
      "\n",
      596610
      "Sketch the algorithm in plain English before coding.\n",
      597611
      "\n",
      598612
      "\n",
      599613
      "## Pseudocode Template\n",
      600614
      "\n",
      601615
      "```\n",
      602616
      "FUNCTION analyze_spending_data(csv_file):\n",
      603617
      " // Step 1: Load and validate data\n",
      604618
      " - Read CSV file into DataFrame\n",
      605619
      " - Check for required columns (Date, Amount, Category, Description)\n",
      606620
      " - Handle missing or invalid data\n",
      607621
      " \n",
      608622
      " // Step 2: Clean financial data \n",
      609623
      " - Remove dollar signs from Amount column\n",
      610624
      " - Convert to numeric values\n",
      611625
      " - Separate positive spending from refunds\n",
      612626
      " \n",
      613627
      " // Step 3: Calculate business metrics\n",
      614628
      " - Group transactions by category\n",
      615629
      " - Calculate totals, averages, counts per category\n",
      616630
      " - Identify spending patterns and outliers\n",
      617631
      " \n",
      618632
      " // Step 4: Generate insights\n",
      619633
      " - Calculate percentages of total spending\n",
      620634
      " - Identify top spending categories\n",
      621635
      " - Suggest potential savings opportunities\n",
      622636
      " \n",
      623637
      " // Step 5: Format for presentation\n",
      624638
      " - Create business-friendly output\n",
      625639
      " - Include currency formatting\n",
      626640
      " - Add explanatory text for insights\n",
      627641
      " \n",
      628642
      " RETURN formatted_analysis\n",
      629643
      "```\n",
      630644
      "\n",
      631645
      "**🤖 AI Prompt to Try:**\n",
      632646
      "```\n",
      633647
      "\"I am developing a Smart Finance Assistant called Budget Buddy that analyses CSV transaction data. Please review my pseudocode and suggest improvements.\n",
      634648
      "\n",
      635649
      "The application should load transaction data, clean dollar signs from amounts, handle missing values, separate spending from refunds, calculate spending by category, identify the highest spending area, generate financial recommendations, and format the results for a user-friendly finance app.\n",
      636650
      "\n",
      637651
      "Please also suggest any edge cases I should handle, such as empty files, missing columns, invalid dates, refunds, zero values, duplicate transactions, and non-numeric amount values.\"\n",
      638652
      "```\n",
      639653
      "\n",
      640654
      "\n",
      641655
      "**Your Pseudocode:**\n",
      642656
      "FUNCTION budget_buddy_analysis(csv_file):\n",
      643657
      "\n",
      644658
      " FUNCTION budget_buddy_smart_finance_assistant(csv_file):\n",
      645659
      "\n",
      646660
      " // Step 1: Load and validate data\n",
      647661
      " - Read the uploaded CSV file into a DataFrame\n",
      648662
      " - Check that the file is not empty\n",
      649663
      " - Check that required columns exist:\n",
      650664
      " Date, Amount, Category, Description\n",
      651665
      " - Show a clear error message if any required column is missing\n",
      652666
      "\n",
      653667
      " // Step 2: Clean financial data\n",
      654668
      " - Remove dollar signs and commas from the Amount column\n",
      655669
      " - Convert Amount values into numeric format\n",
      656670
      " - Convert Date values into date format\n",
      657671
      " - Remove rows with missing Date, Amount, or Category\n",
      658672
      " - Clean extra spaces from Category and Description columns\n",
      659673
      "\n",
      660674
      " // Step 3: Separate spending and refunds\n",
      661675
      " - Identify positive Amount values as normal spending\n",
      662676
      " - Identify negative Amount values as refunds\n",
      663677
      " - Store spending and refunds separately\n",
      664678
      "\n",
      665679
      " // Step 4: Calculate business metrics\n",
      666680
      " - Calculate total positive spending\n",
      667681
      " - Calculate total refund amount\n",
      668682
      " - Calculate net spending after refunds\n",
      669683
      " - Calculate average transaction amount\n",
      670684
      " - Group spending by category\n",
      671685
      " - Count transactions in each category\n",
      672686
      " - Identify the highest spending category\n",
      673687
      " - Calculate percentage of total spending for each category\n",
      674688
      "\n",
      675689
      " // Step 5: Generate financial insights\n",
      676690
      " - Identify major spending areas\n",
      677691
      " - Highlight non-essential categories such as Shopping, Food Delivery, Dining Out, and Entertainment\n",
      678692
      " - Suggest practical savings opportunities\n",
      679693
      " - Give simple budgeting recommendations\n",
      680694
      " - Format advice in user-friendly language\n",
      681695
      "\n",
      682696
      " // Step 6: Create visual outputs\n",
      683697
      " - Create a bar chart showing spending by category\n",
      684698
      " - Create a pie chart showing percentage spending breakdown\n",
      685699
      " - Prepare chart outputs for the user interface\n",
      686700
      "\n",
      687701
      " // Step 7: Add custom financial tool\n",
      688702
      " - Create a savings goal calculator\n",
      689703
      " - Ask user for current savings, monthly contribution, and target amount\n",
      690704
      " - Calculate how many months are needed to reach the savings goal\n",
      691705
      " - Return a simple savings goal message\n",
      692706
      "\n",
      693707
      " // Step 8: Add AI chatbot support\n",
      694708
      " - Create a finance chatbot personality called Budget Buddy\n",
      695709
      " - Allow users to ask finance-related questions\n",
      696710
      " - Generate simple and practical budgeting advice\n",
      697711
      " - Keep responses supportive and easy to understand\n",
      698712
      "\n",
      699713
      " // Step 9: Add simple RAG-style guidance\n",
      700714
      " - Store basic budgeting knowledge about food delivery, shopping, subscriptions, transport, and savings\n",
      701715
      " - Match user questions with relevant budgeting topics\n",
      702716
      " - Return useful advice from the budgeting knowledge base\n",
      703717
      "\n",
      704718
      " // Step 10: Integrate Gradio UI\n",
      705719
      " - Create a Gradio web interface\n",
      706720
      " - Add CSV file upload input\n",
      707721
      " - Add spending analysis output section\n",
      708722
      " - Add savings goal calculator section\n",
      709723
      " - Add chatbot question and response section\n",
      710724
      " - Connect all functions to Gradio buttons\n",
      711725
      " - Launch the Smart Finance Assistant web app\n",
      712726
      "\n",
      713727
      " // Step 11: Return final results\n",
      714728
      " - Return cleaned transaction data\n",
      715729
      " - Return spending summary\n",
      716730
      " - Return category analysis\n",
      717731
      " - Return financial recommendations\n",
      718732
      " - Return chart outputs\n",
      719733
      " - Return savings goal result\n",
      720734
      " - Return chatbot response\n",
      721735
      "\n",
      722736
      "END FUNCTION\n",
      723737
      "\n",
      724738
      "END FUNCTION\n",
      725739
      "\n",
      726740
      "## STEP 5: Convert to Python\n",
      727741
      "\n",
      728742
      "**💻 Implementation with AI Collaboration**\n",
      729743
      "\n",
      730744
      "Now implement your solution using AI assistance. Focus on creating professional, business-appropriate code.\n",
      731745
      "\n",
      732746
      "\n",
      733747
      "## 🤖 Implementation Strategy\n",
      734748
      "\n",
      735749
      "**Effective AI Prompts for Implementation:**\n",
      736750
      "```\n",
      737751
      "\"I'm implementing a Smart Finance Assistant. Based on my pseudocode, please create\n",
      738752
      "a Python function that [specific functionality]. The code should:\n",
      739753
      "- Handle real-world CSV data issues (dollar signs, missing values)\n",
      740754
      "- Include clear comments explaining business logic\n",
      741755
      "- Use professional variable names\n",
      742756
      "- Format output for business presentation\n",
      743757
      "- Include basic error handling\"\n",
      744758
      "```\n",
      745759
      "\n",
      746760
      "**Remember to critique and improve AI responses before using them!**\n",
      747761
      ":::\n",
      748762
      "\n",
      749763
      "### Foundation Data Processing Functions"
      750764
      ]
      751765
      },

      753767
      "cell_type": "code",
      754768
      "metadata": {
      755769
      "id": "1EgKZ3P16WsJ",
      756770
      "colab": {
      757771
      "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
      758772
      },
      759773
      "outputId": "17fc06d7-dfba-47cc-f276-30788711267d"
      760774
      },
      761775
      "source": [
      762776
      "!pip install hands-on-ai gradio pandas matplotlib\n",
      763777
      "import pandas as pd\n",
      764778
      "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
      765779
      "import gradio as gr\n",
      766780
      "from hands_on_ai.chat import get_response\n",
      767781
      "\n",
      768782
      "\n",
      769783
      "# -------------------------\n",
      770784
      "# Sample Transaction Dataset\n",
      771785
      "# -------------------------\n",
      772786
      "\n",
      773787
      "sample_transactions = {\n",
      774788
      " 'Date': [\n",
      775789
      " '2024-09-01', '2024-09-02', '2024-09-03', '2024-09-04',\n",
      776790
      " '2024-09-05', '2024-09-06', '2024-09-07', '2024-09-08',\n",
      777791
      " '2024-09-09', '2024-09-10'\n",
      778792
      " ],\n",
      779793
      " 'Amount': [\n",
      780794
      " '$72.40', '$18.50', '$120.00', '$6.80', '-$20.00',\n",
      781795
      " '$14.99', '$42.30', '$9.50', '$65.00', '$28.75'\n",
      782796
      " ],\n",
      783797
      " 'Category': [\n",
      784798
      " 'Food Delivery', 'Fuel', 'Shopping', 'Coffee', 'Refund',\n",
      785799
      " 'Subscription', 'Groceries', 'Transport', 'Entertainment', 'Dining Out'\n",
      786800
      " ],\n",
      787801
      " 'Description': [\n",
      788802
      " 'Uber Eats', 'BP Service Station', 'Kmart', 'Starbucks',\n",
      789803
      " 'Returned Headphones', 'Netflix', 'Coles', 'Transperth',\n",
      790804
      " 'Event Cinema', 'Local Restaurant'\n",
      791805
      " ]\n",
      792806
      "}\n",
      793807
      "\n",
      794808
      "df_sample = pd.DataFrame(sample_transactions)\n",
      795809
      "print(df_sample)\n",
      796810
      "\n",
      797811
      "\n",
      798812
      "# -------------------------\n",
      799813
      "# 1. Data Loading and Cleaning\n",
      800814
      "# -------------------------\n",
      801815
      "\n",
      802816
      "def load_and_clean_transaction_data(file_path):\n",
      803817
      " required_columns = ['Date', 'Amount', 'Category', 'Description']\n",
      804818
      "\n",
      805819
      " try:\n",
      806820
      " if isinstance(file_path, pd.DataFrame):\n",
      807821
      " df = file_path.copy()\n",
      808822
      " else:\n",
      809823
      " df = pd.read_csv(file_path)\n",
      810824
      "\n",
      811825
      " missing_columns = [col for col in required_columns if col not in df.columns]\n",
      812826
      "\n",
      813827
      " if missing_columns:\n",
      814828
      " raise ValueError(f\"Missing required columns: {missing_columns}\")\n",
      815829
      "\n",
      816830
      " df = df[required_columns]\n",
      817831
      "\n",
      818832
      " df['Amount'] = df['Amount'].astype(str).replace('[\\\\$,]', '', regex=True)\n",
      819833
      " df['Amount'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Amount'], errors='coerce')\n",
      820834
      " df['Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Date'], errors='coerce')\n",
      821835
      "\n",
      822836
      " df = df.dropna(subset=['Date', 'Amount', 'Category'])\n",
      823837
      "\n",
      824838
      " df['Category'] = df['Category'].astype(str).str.strip()\n",
      825839
      " df['Description'] = df['Description'].astype(str).str.strip()\n",
      826840
      "\n",
      827841
      " return df\n",
      828842
      "\n",
      829843
      " except Exception as error:\n",
      830844
      " print(f\"Error loading transaction data: {error}\")\n",
      831845
      " return pd.DataFrame()\n",
      832846
      "\n",
      833847
      "\n",
      834848
      "clean_data = load_and_clean_transaction_data(df_sample)\n",
      835849
      "print(clean_data)\n",
      836850
      "\n",
      837851
      "\n",
      838852
      "\n",
      839853
      "# Test your function\n",
      840854
      "# clean_data = load_and_clean_transaction_data(df_sample)\n",
      841855
      "# print(clean_data)"
      842856
      ],
      843-
      "execution_count": 8,
      857+
      "execution_count": null,
      844858

      {
      973987
      "cell_type": "code",
      974988
      "metadata": {
      975989
      "id": "_K8KDSqg6WsK",
      976990
      "colab": {
      977991
      "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"

      },
      979993
      "outputId": "6848d111-75cc-4d30-dca6-83dc055e3d64"
      980994
      },
      981995
      "source": [
      982996
      "def analyze_spending_patterns(df):\n",
      983997
      " positive_spending = df[df['Amount'] > 0]\n",
      984998
      " refunds = df[df['Amount'] < 0]\n",
      985999
      "\n",
      9861000
      " total_spending = positive_spending['Amount'].sum()\n",
      9871001
      " total_refunds = refunds['Amount'].sum()\n",
      9881002
      " net_spending = df['Amount'].sum()\n",
      9891003
      " average_transaction = positive_spending['Amount'].mean()\n",
      9901004
      "\n",
      9911005
      " category_summary = positive_spending.groupby('Category')['Amount'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)\n",
      9921006
      "\n",
      9931007
      " if not category_summary.empty:\n",
      9941008
      " highest_category = category_summary.idxmax()\n",
      9951009
      " highest_category_amount = category_summary.max()\n",
      9961010
      " else:\n",
      9971011
      " highest_category = \"No spending data available\"\n",
      9981012
      " highest_category_amount = 0\n",
      9991013
      "\n",
      10001014
      " category_percentages = (category_summary / total_spending * 100).round(2)\n",
      10011015
      "\n",
      10021016
      " return {\n",
      10031017
      " \"total_spending\": total_spending,\n",
      10041018
      " \"total_refunds\": total_refunds,\n",
      10051019
      " \"net_spending\": net_spending,\n",
      10061020
      " \"average_transaction\": average_transaction,\n",
      10071021
      " \"category_summary\": category_summary,\n",
      10081022
      " \"category_percentages\": category_percentages,\n",
      10091023
      " \"highest_category\": highest_category,\n",
      10101024
      " \"highest_category_amount\": highest_category_amount\n",
      10111025
      " }\n",
      10121026
      "\n",
      10131027
      "\n",
      10141028
      "analysis = analyze_spending_patterns(clean_data)\n",
      10151029
      "print(analysis)\n",
      10161030
      "# Test your function\n",
      10171031
      "# analysis = analyze_spending_patterns(clean_data)\n",
      10181032
      "# print(analysis)"
      10191033
      ],
      1020-
      "execution_count": 9,
      1034+
      "execution_count": null,
      10211035
      "outputs": [
      10221036
      {

      10271041

      10441058

      10451059
      "Coffee 1.80\n",
      10461060
      "Name: Amount, dtype: float64, 'highest_category': 'Shopping', 'highest_category_amount': 120.0}\n"
      10471061
      ]
      10481062
      }

      },
      10511065
      {
      10521066
      "cell_type": "code",
      10531067
      "metadata": {
      10541068
      "id": "B6CyokTL6WsK",
      10551069
      "colab": {
      10561070
      "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
      10571071
      "height": 1000
      10581072
      },
      10591073
      "outputId": "3f735003-e05f-4b68-8c1f-969dc289422a"
      10601074
      },
      10611075
      "source": [
      10621076
      "# 🤖 AI Collaboration: Business Insights Generator\n",
      10631077
      "# Ask AI to help create professional financial recommendations\n",
      10641078
      "\n",
      10651079
      "def generate_financial_recommendations(analysis_data):\n",
      10661080
      " highest_category = analysis_data[\"highest_category\"]\n",
      10671081
      " highest_amount = analysis_data[\"highest_category_amount\"]\n",
      10681082
      " total_spending = analysis_data[\"total_spending\"]\n",
      10691083
      " net_spending = analysis_data[\"net_spending\"]\n",
      10701084
      " average_transaction = analysis_data[\"average_transaction\"]\n",
      10711085
      "\n",
      10721086
      " report = []\n",
      10731087
      " report.append(\"Budget Buddy Financial Recommendations\")\n",
      10741088
      " report.append(\"--------------------------------------\")\n",
      10751089
      " report.append(f\"Total positive spending: ${total_spending:.2f}\")\n",
      10761090
      " report.append(f\"Net spending after refunds: ${net_spending:.2f}\")\n",
      10771091
      " report.append(f\"Average transaction amount: ${average_transaction:.2f}\")\n",
      10781092
      " report.append(f\"Highest spending category: {highest_category} (${highest_amount:.2f})\")\n",
      10791093
      " report.append(\"\")\n",
      10801094
      "\n",
      10811095
      " if highest_category in ['Shopping', 'Entertainment', 'Food Delivery', 'Dining Out']:\n",
      10821096
      " report.append(\n",
      10831097
      " f\"Your highest spending is in {highest_category}. This is a flexible spending area, so setting a weekly limit could help reduce expenses.\"\n",
      10841098
      " )\n",
      10851099
      " else:\n",
      10861100
      " report.append(\n",
      10871101
      " f\"Your highest spending is in {highest_category}. Review this category and check where costs can be reduced.\"\n",
      10881102
      " )\n",
      10891103
      "\n",
      10901104
      " report.append(\"A useful next step is to create a simple weekly budget and review your top spending categories regularly.\")\n",
      10911105
      "\n",
      10921106
      " return \"\\n\".join(report)\n",
      10931107
      "\n",
      10941108
      "\n",
      10951109
      "recommendations = generate_financial_recommendations(analysis)\n",
      10961110
      "print(recommendations)\n",
      10971111
      "\n",
      10981112
      "\n",
      10991113
      "# -------------------------\n",
      11001114
      "# 4. Charts\n",
      11011115
      "# -------------------------\n",
      11021116
      "\n",
      11031117
      "category_summary = analysis[\"category_summary\"]\n",
      11041118
      "\n",
      11051119
      "category_summary.plot(kind=\"bar\")\n",
      11061120
      "plt.title(\"Spending by Category\")\n",
      11071121
      "plt.xlabel(\"Category\")\n",
      11081122
      "plt.ylabel(\"Amount ($)\")\n",
      11091123
      "plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
      11101124
      "plt.tight_layout()\n",
      11111125
      "plt.show()\n",
      11121126
      "\n",
      11131127
      "category_summary.plot(kind=\"pie\", autopct=\"%1.1f%%\")\n",
      11141128
      "plt.title(\"Spending Distribution by Category\")\n",
      11151129
      "plt.ylabel(\"\")\n",
      11161130
      "plt.show()\n",
      11171131
      "\n",
      11181132
      "# Test your function\n",
      11191133
      "# recommendations = generate_financial_recommendations(analysis)\n",
      11201134
      "# print(recommendations)"
      11211135
      ],
      1122-
      "execution_count": 10,
      1136+
      "execution_count": null,
      11231137

      11321146

      "outputId": "88b25ba9-9ab3-4533-b6a7-f0a3caef300c"
      11841198
      },
      11851199
      "source": [
      11861200
      "# 🤖 AI Collaboration: Financial Advice Chatbot\n",
      11871201
      "# Ask AI to help you create a finance-focused chat personality\n",
      11881202
      "\n",
      11891203
      "from hands_on_ai import chat\n",
      11901204
      "\n",
      11911205
      "def create_finance_chat_personality():\n",
      11921206
      " \"\"\"\n",
      11931207
      " Create a finance-focused chatbot personality.\n",
      11941208
      " \"\"\"\n",
      11951209
      "\n",
      11961210
      " return \"\"\"\n",
      11971211
      " You are Budget Buddy, a friendly Smart Finance Assistant for students and young workers.\n",
      11981212
      "\n",
      11991213
      " Your advice should be:\n",
      12001214
      " - simple and easy to understand\n",
      12011215
      " - practical for everyday spending\n",
      12021216
      " - supportive and encouraging\n",
      12031217
      " - focused on budgeting, saving, and spending awareness\n",
      12041218
      "\n",
      12051219
      " Avoid complex financial jargon.\n",
      12061220
      " Do not provide risky investment advice.\n",
      12071221
      " \"\"\"\n",
      12081222
      "\n",
      12091223
      "\n",
      12101224
      "def ask_budget_buddy(question):\n",
      12111225
      "\n",
      12121226
      " finance_personality = create_finance_chat_personality()\n",
      12131227
      "\n",
      12141228
      " prompt = f\"\"\"\n",
      12151229
      " {finance_personality}\n",
      12161230
      "\n",
      12171231
      " User question: {question}\n",
      12181232
      " \"\"\"\n",
      12191233
      "\n",
      12201234
      " try:\n",
      12211235
      " response = get_response(prompt)\n",
      12221236
      " return response\n",
      12231237
      "\n",
      12241238
      " except Exception as error:\n",
      12251239
      " return f\"Chatbot unavailable: {error}\"\n",
      12261240
      "\n",
      12271241
      "\n",
      12281242
      "chat_response = ask_budget_buddy(\n",
      12291243
      " \"I spend too much on coffee, what should I do?\"\n",
      12301244
      ")\n",
      12311245
      "\n",
      12321246
      "print(chat_response)\n",
      12331247
      "# Test your chatbot\n",
      12341248
      "# response = chat.say(\"I spend too much on coffee, what should I do?\")\n",
      12351249
      "# print(response)"
      12361250
      ],
      1237-
      "execution_count": 13,
      1251+
      "execution_count": null,
      12381252
      "outputs": [
      12391253
      {
      12401254
      "output_type": "stream",
      12411255
      "name": "stdout",
      12421256
      "text": [
      12431257
      "🤖 Thinking really hard with 'gemma3:4b'...\n",
      12441258
      "Hey there! It’s totally normal to love a good coffee, but it’s great that you’re noticing it’s creeping into your budget. Let's tackle this – it's totally doable! \n",
      12451259
      "\n",
      12461260
      "Here’s the deal: spending on coffee can really add up. Let’s try a few simple things to bring it under control:\n",
      12471261
      "\n",
      12481262
      "**1. Track It For A Week:** Just for one week, write down *every* coffee you buy – the size, the place, and the price. You’ll be surprised how quickly it adds up!\n",
      12491263
      "\n",
      12501264
      "**2. Small Changes, Big Impact:** \n",
      12511265
      " * **Make Your Own:** Seriously, brewing your own coffee at home is *way* cheaper. You can get a simple drip coffee maker for pretty little, and coffee is much cheaper than buying it out. \n",
      12521266
      " * **Bring Your Own Cup:** Many coffee shops give you a discount if you bring your own mug! \n",
      12531267
      "\n",
      12541268
      "**3. Set a Limit:** Let's say you decide you'll allow yourself one coffee a week. Stick to that limit! \n",
      12551269
      "\n",
      12561270
      "**4. Find Alternatives:** Maybe swap a coffee for a nice tea, or a smoothie. \n",
      12571271
      "\n",
      12581272
      "**Don't beat yourself up!** Everyone slips up sometimes. The important thing is you’re recognizing the problem and taking steps to fix it. \n",
      12591273
      "\n",
      12601274
      "**Want to dig a little deeper?** We can talk about setting realistic goals and figuring out how much you’d *like* to save each month. \n",
      12611275
      "\n",
      12621276
      "How does that sound? Would you like to start tracking those coffees, or do you want to talk about setting a small goal for yourself?\n"
      12631277
      ]
      12641278
      }
      12651279
      ]
      12661280
      },
      12671281
      {
      12681282
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      12691283
      "metadata": {
      12701284
      "id": "Xrns8DxA6WsN"
      12711285
      },
      12721286
      "source": [
      12731287
      "## RAG System for Financial Documents"
      12741288
      ]
      12751289
      },
      12761290
      {
      12771291
      "cell_type": "code",
      12781292
      "metadata": {
      12791293
      "id": "MosuFUX76WsO",
      12801294
      "colab": {
      12811295
      "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
      12821296
      },
      12831297
      "outputId": "0cad171d-4730-4705-fe1b-f4870fbb4fa4"
      12841298
      },
      12851299
      "source": [
      12861300
      "# 🤖 AI Collaboration: Document Retrieval Setup\n",
      12871301
      "# Ask AI to help you set up RAG for financial documents\n",
      12881302
      "\n",
      12891303
      "from hands_on_ai import rag\n",
      12901304
      "\n",
      12911305
      "def setup_financial_rag():\n",
      12921306
      " return {\n",
      12931307
      " \"food\": \"Food delivery can become expensive quickly. Try limiting takeaway orders and preparing simple meals at home.\",\n",
      12941308
      " \"coffee\": \"Small coffee purchases can add up. Try setting a weekly coffee budget.\",\n",
      12951309
      " \"shopping\": \"Shopping expenses can be reduced by setting a weekly limit and avoiding impulse purchases.\",\n",
      12961310
      " \"subscription\": \"Review subscriptions monthly and cancel services you do not use regularly.\",\n",
      12971311
      " \"transport\": \"Transport costs can be reduced by planning trips and using student discounts.\",\n",
      12981312
      " \"savings\": \"A simple savings strategy is to save a fixed amount as soon as income is received.\"\n",
      12991313
      " }\n",
      13001314
      "\n",
      13011315
      "\n",
      13021316
      "def simple_finance_rag(user_question):\n",
      13031317
      " knowledge = setup_financial_rag()\n",
      13041318
      " question = user_question.lower()\n",
      13051319
      "\n",
      13061320
      " for keyword, advice in knowledge.items():\n",
      13071321
      " if keyword in question:\n",
      13081322
      " return advice\n",
      13091323
      "\n",
      13101324
      " return \"Track your spending regularly and review your highest spending categories first.\"\n",
      13111325
      "\n",
      13121326
      "\n",
      13131327
      "rag_answer = simple_finance_rag(\"How can I reduce shopping?\")\n",
      13141328
      "print(rag_answer)\n",
      13151329
      "# Test your RAG system\n",
      13161330
      "# answer = rag.ask(\"What's a good budgeting strategy for someone who overspends on entertainment?\")\n",
      13171331
      "# print(answer)"
      13181332
      ],
      1319-
      "execution_count": 14,
      1333+
      "execution_count": null,
      13201334
      "outputs": [
      13211335
      {
      13221336
      "output_type": "stream",
      13231337
      "name": "stdout",
      13241338
      "text": [
      13251339
      "Shopping expenses can be reduced by setting a weekly limit and avoiding impulse purchases.\n"
      13261340
      ]
      13271341
      }
      13281342
      ]
      13291343
      },
      13301344
      {
      13311345
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      13321346
      "metadata": {
      13331347
      "id": "S4Hn5U126WsO"
      13341348
      },
      13351349
      "source": [
      13361350
      "## Custom Financial Tools"
      13371351
      ]
      13381352
      },
      13391353
      {
      13401354
      "cell_type": "code",
      13411355
      "metadata": {
      13421356
      "id": "ub45iiSj6WsO",
      13431357
      "colab": {
      13441358
      "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
      13451359
      },
      13461360
      "outputId": "7aebc8d8-f092-48c4-e815-93fa9d3a3571"
      13471361
      },
      13481362
      "source": [
      13491363
      "# 🤖 AI Collaboration: Custom Tool Development\n",
      13501364
      "# Ask AI to help you create useful financial calculators\n",
      13511365
      "\n",
      13521366
      "from hands_on_ai import agent\n",
      13531367
      "\n",
      13541368
      "def create_savings_calculator_tool(current_savings, monthly_contribution, target_amount):\n",
      13551369
      " if monthly_contribution <= 0:\n",
      13561370
      " return \"Monthly contribution must be greater than zero.\"\n",
      13571371
      "\n",
      13581372
      " if target_amount <= current_savings:\n",
      13591373
      " return \"You have already reached your savings goal.\"\n",
      13601374
      "\n",
      13611375
      " remaining_amount = target_amount - current_savings\n",
      13621376
      " months_needed = remaining_amount / monthly_contribution\n",
      13631377
      "\n",
      13641378
      " return f\"You need approximately {months_needed:.1f} months to reach your savings goal.\"\n",
      13651379
      "\n",
      13661380
      "\n",
      13671381
      "savings_result = create_savings_calculator_tool(500, 150, 2000)\n",
      13681382
      "print(savings_result)\n",
      13691383
      "\n",
      13701384
      "\n",
      13711385
      "# Register your tool with the agent system\n",
      13721386
      "# agent.register_tool(\"savings_calculator\", create_savings_calculator_tool)"
      13731387
      ],
      1374-
      "execution_count": 15,
      1388+
      "execution_count": null,
      13751389
      "outputs": [
      13761390
      {
      13771391
      "output_type": "stream",
      13781392
      "name": "stdout",
      13791393
      "text": [
      13801394
      "You need approximately 10.0 months to reach your savings goal.\n"
      13811395
      ]
      13821396
      }
      13831397
      ]
      13841398
      },
      13851399
      {
      13861400

      "id": "T_8SbV0N6WsP"
      13891403
      },
      13901404
      "source": [
      13911405
      "## Gradio UI Integration"
      13921406
      ]
      13931407
      },
      13941408
      {
      13951409
      "cell_type": "code",
      13961410
      "metadata": {
      13971411
      "id": "7-ambjxd6WsP",
      13981412
      "colab": {
      13991413
      "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
      14001414
      "height": 646
      14011415
      },
      14021416
      "outputId": "e5d2a5d9-0064-4de9-f0c1-cbdb2cce7fb9"
      14031417
      },
      14041418
      "source": [
      14051419
      "# 🤖 AI Collaboration: Professional UI Design\n",
      14061420
      "# Ask AI to help you create a comprehensive Gradio interface\n",
      14071421
      "\n",
      14081422
      "import gradio as gr\n",
      14091423
      "\n",
      14101424
      "def analyze_uploaded_file(file):\n",
      14111425
      " try:\n",
      14121426
      " data = pd.read_csv(file.name)\n",
      14131427
      " cleaned = load_and_clean_transaction_data(data)\n",
      14141428
      " result = analyze_spending_patterns(cleaned)\n",
      14151429
      " return generate_financial_recommendations(result)\n",
      14161430
      " except Exception as error:\n",
      14171431
      " return f\"Error processing file: {error}\"\n",
      14181432
      "\n",
      14191433
      "\n",
      14201434
      "def create_finance_assistant_ui():\n",
      14211435
      " with gr.Blocks() as demo:\n",
      14221436
      " gr.Markdown(\"# Budget Buddy - Smart Finance Assistant\")\n",
      14231437
      " gr.Markdown(\"Upload CSV transaction data, get spending insights, ask budgeting questions, and calculate savings goals.\")\n",
      14241438
      "\n",
      14251439
      " with gr.Tab(\"CSV Spending Analysis\"):\n",
      14261440
      " file_input = gr.File(label=\"Upload CSV Transaction File\")\n",
      14271441
      " analysis_output = gr.Textbox(label=\"Financial Analysis Report\", lines=12)\n",
      14281442
      " analyze_button = gr.Button(\"Analyse Spending\")\n",
      14291443
      " analyze_button.click(analyze_uploaded_file, inputs=file_input, outputs=analysis_output)\n",
      14301444
      "\n",
      14311445
      " with gr.Tab(\"Savings Goal Calculator\"):\n",
      14321446
      " current_savings = gr.Number(label=\"Current Savings\")\n",
      14331447
      " monthly_contribution = gr.Number(label=\"Monthly Contribution\")\n",
      14341448
      " target_amount = gr.Number(label=\"Target Amount\")\n",
      14351449
      " savings_output = gr.Textbox(label=\"Savings Goal Result\")\n",
      14361450
      " savings_button = gr.Button(\"Calculate\")\n",
      14371451
      " savings_button.click(\n",
      14381452
      " create_savings_calculator_tool,\n",
      14391453
      " inputs=[current_savings, monthly_contribution, target_amount],\n",
      14401454
      " outputs=savings_output\n",
      14411455
      " )\n",
      14421456
      "\n",
      14431457
      " with gr.Tab(\"Budget Buddy Chatbot\"):\n",
      14441458
      " question_input = gr.Textbox(label=\"Ask Budget Buddy a finance question\")\n",
      14451459
      " chatbot_output = gr.Textbox(label=\"Chatbot Response\", lines=8)\n",
      14461460
      " chatbot_button = gr.Button(\"Ask\")\n",
      14471461
      " chatbot_button.click(ask_budget_buddy, inputs=question_input, outputs=chatbot_output)\n",
      14481462
      "\n",
      14491463
      " with gr.Tab(\"RAG Budgeting Guidance\"):\n",
      14501464
      " rag_question = gr.Textbox(label=\"Ask for a budgeting tip\")\n",
      14511465
      " rag_output = gr.Textbox(label=\"Retrieved Budgeting Advice\", lines=6)\n",
      14521466
      " rag_button = gr.Button(\"Get Advice\")\n",
      14531467
      " rag_button.click(simple_finance_rag, inputs=rag_question, outputs=rag_output)\n",
      14541468
      "\n",
      14551469
      " return demo\n",
      14561470
      "\n",
      14571471
      "\n",
      14581472
      "demo = create_finance_assistant_ui()\n",
      14591473
      "demo.launch()\n",
      14601474
      "\n",
      14611475
      "# Launch your complete application\n",
      14621476
      "# demo = create_finance_assistant_ui()\n",
      14631477
      "# demo.launch()"
      14641478
      ],
      1465-
      "execution_count": 16,
      1479+
      "execution_count": null,
      14661480
      "outputs": [
      14671481
      {
      14681482
      "output_type": "stream",
      14691483
      "name": "stdout",
      14701484
      "text": [
      14711485
      "It looks like you are running Gradio on a hosted Jupyter notebook, which requires `share=True`. Automatically setting `share=True` (you can turn this off by setting `share=False` in `launch()` explicitly).\n",
      14721486
      "\n",
      14731487
      "Colab notebook detected. To show errors in colab notebook, set debug=True in launch()\n",
      14741488
      "* Running on public URL: https://be185a4247e90a2866.gradio.live\n",
      14751489
      "\n",
      14761490
      "This share link expires in 1 week. For free permanent hosting and GPU upgrades, run `gradio deploy` from the terminal in the working directory to deploy to Hugging Face Spaces (https://huggingface.co/spaces)\n"
      14771491
      ]
      14781492
      },
      14791493

      15011515
      {
      15021516
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      15031517
      "metadata": {
      15041518
      "id": "zJcPOdl_6WsQ"
      15051519
      },
      15061520
      "source": [
      15071521
      "---\n",
      15081522
      "\n",
      15091523
      "# 🧪 STEP 6: Test with a Variety of Data\n",
      15101524
      "\n",
      15111525
      "**🔍 Comprehensive Testing Strategy**\n",
      15121526
      "\n",
      15131527
      "Create thorough tests for your Smart Finance Assistant to ensure it handles real-world scenarios.\n",
      15141528
      "\n",
      15151529
      "::: {.callout-tip}\n",
      15161530
      "## 🤖 AI Collaboration for Testing\n",
      15171531
      "\n",
      15181532
      "**Effective Testing Prompts:**\n",
      15191533
      "```\n",
      15201534
      "\"Help me create comprehensive test cases for my finance assistant. Include:\n",
      15211535
      "- Normal transaction data\n",
      15221536
      "- Edge cases (refunds, large amounts, missing data)\n",
      15231537
      "- Invalid data scenarios (corrupted files, wrong formats)\n",
      15241538
      "- Business logic validation (spending calculations, recommendations)\n",
      15251539
      "Create assert statements to verify each scenario.\"\n",
      15261540
      "```\n",
      15271541
      ":::\n",
      15281542
      "\n",
      15291543
      "## Foundation Function Tests"
      15301544
      ]
      15311545
      },
      15321546
      {
      15331547
      "cell_type": "code",
      15341548
      "metadata": {
      15351549
      "id": "5Fo6bEcP6WsQ",
      15361550
      "colab": {
      15371551
      "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
      15381552
      },
      15391553
      "outputId": "61e34a75-95cb-4000-9561-781a999493a2"
      15401554
      },
      15411555
      "source": [
      15421556
      "# 🤖 AI Collaboration: Comprehensive Test Suite\n",
      15431557
      "# Ask AI to help you create thorough test cases\n",
      15441558
      "\n",
      15451559
      "def create_test_datasets():\n",
      15461560
      "\n",
      15471561
      " normal_data = pd.DataFrame({\n",
      15481562
      " 'Date': ['2024-09-01', '2024-09-02'],\n",
      15491563
      " 'Amount': ['$50.00', '$25.00'],\n",
      15501564
      " 'Category': ['Groceries', 'Transport'],\n",
      15511565
      " 'Description': ['Coles', 'Transperth']\n",
      15521566
      " })\n",
      15531567
      "\n",
      15541568
      " refund_data = pd.DataFrame({\n",
      15551569
      " 'Date': ['2024-09-01', '2024-09-02'],\n",
      15561570
      " 'Amount': ['$100.00', '-$20.00'],\n",
      15571571
      " 'Category': ['Shopping', 'Refund'],\n",
      15581572
      " 'Description': ['Kmart', 'Returned item']\n",
      15591573
      " })\n",
      15601574
      "\n",
      15611575
      " wrong_column_data = pd.DataFrame({\n",
      15621576
      " 'TransactionDate': ['2024-09-01'],\n",
      15631577
      " 'Cost': ['$50.00'],\n",
      15641578
      " 'Type': ['Food'],\n",
      15651579
      " 'Details': ['Lunch']\n",
      15661580
      " })\n",
      15671581
      "\n",
      15681582
      " return normal_data, refund_data, wrong_column_data\n",
      15691583
      "\n",
      15701584
      "\n",
      15711585
      "def test_data_loading_function():\n",
      15721586
      "\n",
      15731587
      " print(\"🧪 Testing data loading function...\")\n",
      15741588
      "\n",
      15751589
      " normal_data, refund_data, wrong_column_data = create_test_datasets()\n",
      15761590
      "\n",
      15771591
      " cleaned_normal = load_and_clean_transaction_data(normal_data)\n",
      15781592
      " assert cleaned_normal['Amount'].sum() == 75.00\n",
      15791593
      "\n",
      15801594
      " cleaned_refund = load_and_clean_transaction_data(refund_data)\n",
      15811595
      " assert cleaned_refund['Amount'].sum() == 80.00\n",
      15821596
      "\n",
      15831597
      " cleaned_wrong = load_and_clean_transaction_data(wrong_column_data)\n",
      15841598
      " assert cleaned_wrong.empty\n",
      15851599
      "\n",
      15861600
      " print(\"✅ Data loading tests passed.\")\n",
      15871601
      "\n",
      15881602
      "\n",
      15891603
      "def test_spending_analysis():\n",
      15901604
      "\n",
      15911605
      " print(\"🧪 Testing spending analysis...\")\n",
      15921606

      16731687
      "# 🤖 AI Collaboration: Integration Testing\n",
      16741688
      "# Ask AI to help test the complete system integration\n",
      16751689
      "def test_full_workflow():\n",
      16761690
      " print(\"Testing complete workflow integration\")\n",
      16771691
      "\n",
      16781692
      " cleaned = load_and_clean_transaction_data(df_sample)\n",
      16791693
      " result = analyze_spending_patterns(cleaned)\n",
      16801694
      " recommendation = generate_financial_recommendations(result)\n",
      16811695
      " savings_result = create_savings_calculator_tool(500, 150, 2000)\n",
      16821696
      " rag_result = simple_finance_rag(\"How can I reduce shopping?\")\n",
      16831697
      "\n",
      16841698
      " assert not cleaned.empty\n",
      16851699
      " assert result[\"total_spending\"] > 0\n",
      16861700
      " assert \"Budget Buddy\" in recommendation\n",
      16871701
      " assert \"months\" in savings_result\n",
      16881702
      " assert len(rag_result) > 0\n",
      16891703
      "\n",
      16901704
      " print(\"Full workflow test passed\")\n",
      16911705
      "\n",
      16921706
      "\n",
      16931707
      "def test_error_handling():\n",
      16941708
      " print(\"Testing error handling\")\n",
      16951709
      "\n",
      16961710
      " wrong_column_data = pd.DataFrame({\n",
      16971711
      " \"TransactionDate\": [\"2024-09-01\"],\n",
      16981712
      " \"Cost\": [\"$50.00\"],\n",
      16991713
      " \"Type\": [\"Food\"],\n",
      17001714
      " \"Details\": [\"Lunch\"]\n",
      17011715
      " })\n",
      17021716
      "\n",
      17031717
      " cleaned_wrong = load_and_clean_transaction_data(wrong_column_data)\n",
      17041718
      " assert cleaned_wrong.empty\n",
      17051719
      "\n",
      17061720
      " invalid_savings = create_savings_calculator_tool(500, 0, 2000)\n",
      17071721
      " assert \"greater than zero\" in invalid_savings\n",
      17081722
      "\n",
      17091723
      " print(\"Error handling test passed\")\n",
      17101724
      "\n",
      17111725
      "\n",
      17121726
      "try:\n",
      17131727
      " test_full_workflow()\n",
      17141728
      " test_error_handling()\n",
      17151729
      " print(\"Integration tests completed successfully\")\n",
      17161730
      "except Exception as e:\n",
      17171731
      " print(f\"Integration test issue: {e}\")"
      17181732
      ],

      "# 📊 Project Completion Checklist\n",
      17441758

      17451759
